name: Bhai Kulwinder Singh (Anandpur Sahib)
body: Bhai Kulwinder Singh was born on 23 rd August 1988 at the holy city of Anandpur Sahib, district Ropar, Punjab. His father, Sardar Jagdish Singh and mother, Sardarni Jagdish Kaur, both devout Sikhs, raised him in a very spiritual environment. This exposure fostered his interest to learn Kirtan.

He studied 1 st until 10 th class at SGS Khalsa Sen Sec School, Sri Anandpur Sahib. He then went on to learn Kirtan at Sikh Missionary College, Anandpur Sahib from 2005 until 2008. He was initiated into music by Ustad Sumittar Singh (Anandpur Sahib), Ustad Gurbachan Singh (Anandpur Sahib) and Ustad Bishwajit Singh (Gurmat Sangeet Academy, Anandpur Sahib). While enrolled in the Sikh Missionary College, he also learned Gurmat Vidhya and Sikh history from his uncle, Principal Surinder Singh Ji. Subsequently, he studied at Sri Guru Tegh Bahadur Khalsa College, Anandpur Sahib and graduated from there in 2011.

His first tour abroad was to Hong Kong, where he served for 3 months performing Kirtan duties. Since then, he has also travelled to many other countries including Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Dubai, New Zealand etc. Currently, he is based in Australia and is providing Kirtan service in Melbourne since 2019. Accompanying him are Bhai Jarman Singh on the side harmonium and Bhai Inderpreet Singh on tabla.
If anyone has more recordings of Bhai Kulwinder Singh Ji to share, please contact us.
